entrance.name: Union Station
entrance.description: You are in Union Station, the busiest transit hub in Canada, connecting GO Transit, VIA Rail, and the TTC. The crowd moves endlessly around you. TMU station is NorthEast and Museum station is NorthWest.

items.name: PRESTO CARD
items.description: A small black card used to pay for transit. Funds are limited.

library.name: Library
library.description: Books line the walls. It's quiet.
